message:
Fix quickstart: include web/dist root files, remove dev mode default (#845)

- GoReleaser: add web/dist/* glob to include index.html and other root
  files in the console archive (web/dist/**/* only matches subdirectories)
- start.sh: remove DEV_MODE=true default — binary quickstart should run
  in production mode to serve web/dist static files at :8080

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -56,6 +56,8 @@ archives:
       - tar.gz
     name_template: "console_{{ .Version }}_{{ .Os }}_{{ .Arch }}"
     files:
+      - src: "web/dist/*"
+        dst: "web/dist"
       - src: "web/dist/**/*"
         dst: "web/dist"

@@ -214,7 +214,7 @@ fi
 # Start console (serves frontend from web/dist at the specified port)
 echo "Starting console on port $PORT..."
 cd "$INSTALL_DIR"
-PORT="$PORT" DEV_MODE="${DEV_MODE:-true}" ./console --port "$PORT" &
+./console --port "$PORT" &
 CONSOLE_PID=$!
 
 # Wait for console to be ready
